traits.name: Fearsome
traits.text: If a small enemy is within 3 hexes of one or more Unburnt Reavers and has fewer than three models in its hex, all of its skills have -1 {accuracy_die}.

factionTrait.name: Guardian Champion
factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Twisting Grove
uniqueTraits.text: Once during Durthax's activation, choose a banner within 2 hexes of Durthax and place it on another empty objective hex within 2 hexes of them.

ultimate.name: Wellspring
ultimate.text: Plot phase only. Durthax may use this skill as a bonus action. Every champion within range may take a claim action.

plotSkills.name: Uproot
plotSkills.text: Place Durthax on a hex up to 2 hexes from their current hex.

plotSkills.name: Canopy
plotSkills.text: Small followers within range gain {protection_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Bough Strike
clashSkills.text: This skill gains {damage_die} equal to the amount the hit roll exceeds the target's {dodge}, to a maximum of 8 additional {damage_die}.

clashSkills.name: Growth Spurt
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move the target up to 1 hex away from Durthax and remove 1 wound from Durthax.

traits.name: Branch Ward
traits.text: Enemy champions and followers can't be placed or recruited in hexes adjacent to Treekin.

plotSkills.name: Photosynthesis
plotSkills.text: Gain {dodge_boon}

plotSkills.name: Splinter Group
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move the target up to 1 hex away from this Treekin and this Treekin may move 1 hex toward the target.

clashSkills.name: Taking Root
clashSkills.text: If Durthax is within range, place them in a hex adjacent to this Treekin.

clashSkills.name: Fertilizer
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: You may remove 1 wound from Durthax.

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion

uniqueTraits.name: Pack Alpha
uniqueTraits.text: When Fenra knocks out an enemy follower, move a friendly model within 3 hexes of her up to 1 hex. Each model may only be moved once per activation using this trait.

ultimate.text: Move another model within range up to 3 hexes.

plotSkills.name: The Wolf is Loose
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Fenra moves up to 2 hexes towards the target.

clashSkills.name: Feral Bite
clashSkills.text: Target up to 3 models in a single hex. This skill has +1 {damage_die} for each hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more friendly followers.

clashSkills.name: Shatterstorm
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to 2 followers within range. This skill has +1 {damage_die} for each hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more friendly followers.

traits.name: Gang Up
traits.text: When a Chainless Cur uses a skill targeting a small follower it gains +3 {accuracy_die} if there are more followers in the Chainless Cur's hex than in the target's hex.

plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Place each Chainless Cur within range of the target in a hex adjacent to the target.

clashSkills.name: Snarl
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move each follower model in the target's hex up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Maim and Encircle
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move a Chainless Cur up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.text: Grant {damage_die_boon}.

clashSkills.text: If the Knightshades made a recruit action this activation, Death's Door has +1 {accuracy_die} and {damage_die}.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Rock Concert
uniqueTraits.text: If all 3 Quartzlings are on the battlefield when Nia activates, she may make a bonus action that activation.

ultimate.name: Geode
ultimate.text: Plot phase only. Choose a Quartzling that is the only model in its hex and is adjacent to an objective hex, and replace it with an objective hex. If it is within 2 hexes of Nia, she may make a claim action on that hex.

plotSkills.name: Crystal Mirror
plotSkills.text: Choose a boon on any model within range. Then choose a friendly model within range to gain that boon.

plotSkills.name: Meditation
plotSkills.text: Gain {accuracy_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: March
plotSkills.text: Move Nia up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Crystal Glare
clashSkills.text: Choose a blight on any model within range. Then choose an enemy model within range to gain that blight.

clashSkills.name: Erosion
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {protection_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Blinding Light
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight}.

traits.name: Rock Formation
traits.text: When Nia's banner is removed from the battlefield, the Quartzlings may immediately make a recruit action, even if it is the end phase.

plotSkills.name: Calcify
plotSkills.text: If this Quartzling is the only model in its hex and is adjacent to an objective hex, replace it with an objective hex.

plotSkills.name: Shimmer
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}

clashSkills.name: Rolling Stones
clashSkills.text: Each Quartzling may move up to 3 hexes in a straight line.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Rippling Scales
uniqueTraits.text: When a Splashling leaves the battlefield, Raith'Marid may gain the boon of your choice.

ultimate.name: Tsunami
ultimate.text: Place Raith'Marid on a hex within range. Then move each enemy model within 2 hexes of him up to 2 hexes in the order of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Undertow
plotSkills.text: Choose an empty objective hex within range. Place it on an empty non-objective hex within range.

plotSkills.name: Ker-Splash
plotSkills.text: Choose a hex within range containing one Splashling. Remove the Splashling and place Raith'Marid in that hex.

plotSkills.name: Jet
plotSkills.text: Move a Splashling within range up to 3 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Ker-Splash
clashSkills.text: Choose a hex within range containing one Splashling. Remove the Splashling and place Raith'Marid in that hex.

clashSkills.name: Headbutt
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Lunging Strike
clashSkills.text: Before the hit roll, move Raith'Marid up to 1 hex towards the target.

traits.name: Like Water
traits.text: Once per phase during the Splashlings' activation, you may choose a boon on Raith'Marid. The Splashlings gain that boon.

plotSkills.name: Current
plotSkills.text: You may place each Splashling in a hex up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

plotSkills.name: Tide
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Current
clashSkills.text: You may place each Splashling in a hex up to 3 hexes from its current hex.

clashSkills.name: Tide
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex.

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Brutal Master
uniqueTraits.text: Once per hit roll or damage roll before rolling the dice, you may remove one Red Bandit from a hex within 3 hexes of Rangosh to add 1 die to Rangosh's roll.

ultimate.name: Beastly Charge
ultimate.text: Move Rangosh up to 2 hexes. Then you may place up to 2 wounds on an enemy within range.

plotSkills.name: Channel Rage
plotSkills.text: Gain {damage_die_boon}

plotSkills.name: Break Spirit
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {dodge_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Jawbreaker
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex away from Rangosh.

clashSkills.name: Whiplash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex toward Rangosh.

traits.name: Stolen Treasure
traits.text: If the Red Bandits cause an enemy model to gain a wound when they use a skill action, they may gain one boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Induct
plotSkills.text: If the Red Bandits are below their maximum unit size, add one to a hex containing at least one Red Bandit.

plotSkills.name: Ambush
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

clashSkills.name: Ambush
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Roll the Bones
uniqueTraits.text: At the end of Rattlebone's activation, roll one die. If you roll a 1 or 2, you may remove a boon or blight from a model within that many hexes of Rattlebone and place it on a different model within that many hexes.

ultimate.name: Power Hex
ultimate.text: Choose one blight for each Hexling within range. Each enemy champion within range gains those blights.

plotSkills.name: Call Totems
plotSkills.text: Remove any number of Hexlings from the battlefield. Then place them on hexes within 2 hexes of Rattlebone.

plotSkills.name: Grasping Curse
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight} or {dodge_blight}.

clashSkills.name: Cursed Ground
clashSkills.text: Place up to two objective hexes on empty non-objective hexes within range. Remove them at the end of the clash phase.

clashSkills.name: Deadly Curse
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight} or {damage_die_blight}.

traits.name: Hex Eaters
traits.text: When Rattlebone rolls a blank on her Roll the Bones roll, the Hexlings may gain the boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Attune Magic
plotSkills.text: Gain the boon of your choice.

plotSkills.name: Hex Bolt
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains the blight of your choice.

clashSkills.name: Purge Magic
clashSkills.text: Move all boons and blights from the Hexlings to a friendly model within range.

clashSkills.name: Hex Bolt
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains the blight of your choice.

factionTrait.name: Guardian Champion
factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Unyielding
uniqueTraits.text: If Rhodri is adjacent to a friendly banner, he cannot be moved by enemy models.

ultimate.name: Bannerfall
ultimate.text: Clash phase only. Make a claim action.

plotSkills.name: March
plotSkills.text: Move Rhodri up to 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Answer the Call
plotSkills.text: Choose a follower within range. Its unit makes a recruit action.

plotSkills.name: Hold!
plotSkills.text: Grant {protection_boon}.

clashSkills.name: March
clashSkills.text: Move Rhodri up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Shield Bash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}. Move target up to 2 hexes away from Rhodri.

traits.name: Shield Wall
traits.text: Household Guard in hexes adjacent to Rhodri cannot be moved by enemy models.

plotSkills.name: Brace
plotSkills.text: Gain {protection_boon}.

plotSkills.name: March
plotSkills.text: Move each Household Guard up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: March
clashSkills.text: Move each Household Guard up to 1 hex.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Runecaller
uniqueTraits.text: After Shayle makes an action during his activation, if he is within 3 hexes of Landslide, you may place Landslide in a hex up to 2 hexes from its current hex.

ultimate.name: Avalanche
ultimate.text: Choose any number of objective hexes within 3 hexes of Landslide. Move each up to 1 hex onto an empty non-objective hex in any order. Models on the objective hexes move with them.

plotSkills.name: Stone Strength
plotSkills.text: If Landslide is within range, it gains {protection_boon} or {damage_die_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Runeweaving
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move a boon from the target to any model within range.

clashSkills.name: Tremor
clashSkills.text: Remove all boons from enemies within range.

clashSkills.name: Stone Spikes
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {move_blight}.

traits.name: Rubble
traits.text: When Landslide is knocked out, replace it with an objective hex.

plotSkills.name: Eruption
plotSkills.text: Friendly and enemy models adjacent to Landslide gain {protection_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Earthquake
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target champion or all followers in target's unit up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Earthquake
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target champion or all followers in target's unit up to 2 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Boulder Bash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {dodge_blight}

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Out Of My Way!
uniqueTraits.text: Skullbreaker may move through small followers' hexes but cannot end his movement on those hexes.

ultimate.name: Finisher
ultimate.text: Clash phase only. Skullbreaker may make up to 3 skill actions.

plotSkills.name: Shake It Off
plotSkills.text: Remove a blight from Skullbreaker.

plotSkills.name: Hunting Call
plotSkills.text: Follower units within range gain {accuracy_die_boon}.

clashSkills.name: I Smell Blood...
clashSkills.text: Skullbreaker's Jawblade skill gains +4 {accuracy_die} and 'Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Go For The Belly!
clashSkills.text: Skullbreaker's Jawblade skill gains +2 {damage_die} and 'Hit Effect: Move target up to 2 hexes.' this activation.

clashSkills.name: Jawblade
clashSkills.text: After using this skill, Skullbreaker gains {move_blight}.

traits.name: Set Up The Boss!
traits.text: When a Tooth Bearer damages an enemy, Skullbreaker may gain a boon of your choice or move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Rush
plotSkills.text: Choose a hex. Each Tooth Bearer in that hex may move up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Feral Howl
plotSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} for each Tooth Bearer adjacent to the target. Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex. Inflict {dodge_blight}

clashSkills.name: Skullcracker
clashSkills.text: Gain {damage_die_boon}.

clashSkills.name: Club Bash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: The target gains 1 wound.

factionTrait.name: Slayer Champion
factionTrait.text: A slayer moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy champion.

uniqueTraits.name: Gang Boss
uniqueTraits.text: Sneaky Peet's skills have +1 {accuracy_die} for each Sneaky Stabber adjacent to the target.

ultimate.name: Pounce
ultimate.text: Before the hit roll, you may place Sneaky Peet on a hex adjacent to the target.

plotSkills.name: Leap
plotSkills.text: You may place Sneaky Peet on a hex up to 2 hexes from his current hex.

plotSkills.name: Backstab
plotSkills.text: If this attack hits a champion, the champion gains 1 wound.

clashSkills.name: Plot Revenge
clashSkills.text: Grant {accuracy_die_boon}

clashSkills.name: Annoy
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 2 hexes toward Sneaky Peet.

clashSkills.name: Backstab
clashSkills.text: If this attack hits a champion, the champion gains 1 wound.

traits.name: Small and Sneaky
traits.text: Sneaky Stabbers may move through other models' hexes but cannot end their movement on those hexes.

plotSkills.name: Sprint
plotSkills.text: One Sneaky Stabber may move up to 3 hexes.

clashSkills.name: Sneak
clashSkills.text: Remove one Sneaky Stabber from the battlefield. Then make a recruit action.

clashSkills.name: Irritate
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight}.

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Haunting
uniqueTraits.text: When Styx is knocked out, your opponent may not move him.

ultimate.name: The Reaping
ultimate.text: Knock out an enemy model within range. It does not award you any steps on the battle ladder.

plotSkills.name: Hour is Nigh
plotSkills.text: Styx may use this skill as a bonus action. An enemy model within range gains {protection_blight}.

plotSkills.name: Dead Beckoning
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex toward Styx.

clashSkills.name: Apparition
clashSkills.text: Move one objective hex within range 1 hex toward Styx onto an empty non-objective hex. Models on the objective hex move with it.

clashSkills.name: Scythe Slash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {damage_die_blight}.

traits.name: Drag
traits.text: At the end of the Abyssal Hounds' activation, move up to 2 small follower models within 2 hexes of an Abyssal Hound, 1 hex towards that Abyssal Hound.

plotSkills.name: Pack Hunters
plotSkills.text: Move each Abyssal Hound within 4 hexes of Styx up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Howl
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {accuracy_die_blight}

clashSkills.name: Torn to Shreds
clashSkills.text: If both Abyssal Hounds are adjacent to the same enemy banner, remove the banner from the battlefield.

clashSkills.name: Triple Bite
clashSkills.text: Make 3 hit rolls instead of 1. For each hit, this skill has +2 {damage_die}.

factionTrait.name: Maelstrom Champion
factionTrait.text: A maelstrom moves the turn token +1 step when they knock out an enemy follower.

uniqueTraits.name: Superiority
uniqueTraits.text: Titus has +1 {dodge} against followers' hit rolls and +1 {protection} against followers' damage rolls.

ultimate.name: Path of Destruction
ultimate.text: Titus may make a skill action. Then he may move 1 hex. Then he may make another skill action.

plotSkills.name: Challenge
plotSkills.text: An enemy model within range gains two different blights of your choice. Titus gains a blight of your opponent's choice.

plotSkills.name: I'll Kill You All!
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move all followers in target's unit that are within range up to 1 hex.

clashSkills.name: Piercing Strike
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two models in the same hex.

clashSkills.name: Sweeping Slash
clashSkills.text: This skill may target up to two models that are in different hexes.

traits.name: Rapid Deployment
traits.text: After using a recruit action, the Glory Seeker returned to the battlefield moves up to 2 hexes.

plotSkills.name: Roar of Battle
plotSkills.text: One champion within range may move 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Outflank
plotSkills.text: Hit Effect: Place each Glory Seeker that is adjacent to the target in a hex adjacent to the target.

clashSkills.name: Hack
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Inflict {protection_blight}

clashSkills.name: Surround Pound
clashSkills.text: This skill has +1 {accuracy_die} and +1 {damage_die} for each other hex adjacent to the target that contains one or more Glory Seekers.
